unilateral_modification.title: Unilateral Modification Clause
unilateral_modification.description: One party can modify contract terms without the other's consent
unilateral_modification.pattern: (either party|either of the parties|[A-Z][a-z]+ [A-Z][a-z]+).*?(may|can|shall have the right to|is permitted to).*?(amend|modify|alter|change|vary|revise).*?(this agreement|the agreement|these terms).*?(without|without requiring|without obtaining|without needing).*?(consent|approval|agreement).*?(of the other party|from the other party)
unilateral_modification.suggestion: Require mutual agreement for any modifications to ensure fairness
unilateral_modification.reference: Contract Law Principle of Mutuality and Good Faith

automatic_renewal.title: Automatic Renewal Without Notice
automatic_renewal.description: Contract renews automatically without requiring advance notice for non-renewal
automatic_renewal.suggestion: Add required notice period (typically 30-60 days) for non-renewal
automatic_renewal.reference: Consumer Protection Laws and Contract Fairness Principles

excessive_liability.title: Excessive Liability Exposure
excessive_liability.description: Unlimited or excessive liability exposure without reasonable caps
excessive_liability.suggestion: Add reasonable liability caps (e.g., fees paid, insurance coverage amounts)

unilateral_termination.title: Unilateral Termination Rights
unilateral_termination.description: One party can terminate without cause or with minimal notice
unilateral_termination.pattern: (either party|either of the parties|[A-Z][a-z]+ [A-Z][a-z]+).*?(may|can|shall have the right to|is permitted to).*?(terminate|end|cancel).*?(this agreement|the agreement).*?(at any time|without cause|without reason).*?(with|upon).*?(\d+).*?(day|days|week|weeks|month|months).*?(notice|notification)
unilateral_termination.suggestion: Balance termination rights with reasonable notice periods or mutual agreement requirements

broad_indemnification.title: Overly Broad Indemnification
broad_indemnification.description: One party required to indemnify for overly broad scope including their own negligence
broad_indemnification.pattern: (indemnify|indemnification|hold harmless).*?(and|&).*?(defend).*?(against|for).*?(all|any|every).*?(claims|demands|actions|suits|proceedings).*?(arising out of|related to|in connection with).*?(negligence|willful misconduct|breach)
broad_indemnification.suggestion: Limit indemnification to third-party claims arising from indemnifying party's gross negligence or willful misconduct
broad_indemnification.reference: Standard Indemnification Principles and Insurance Requirements

jurisdiction_shopping.title: Unfair Jurisdiction and Venue
jurisdiction_shopping.description: Requires litigation in inconvenient or unfavorable jurisdiction
jurisdiction_shopping.pattern: (governing law|jurisdiction|venue).*?(shall be|is|will be).*?(the courts of|the state|the province|the country).*?[A-Z][a-z]+.*?(exclusive|sole|only).*?(jurisdiction|venue|forum)
jurisdiction_shopping.suggestion: Consider neutral jurisdiction or mutual agreement on dispute resolution forum
jurisdiction_shopping.reference: Forum Non Conveniens and Fair Forum Selection Principles
